text: The instrument asks, since this has to do with that house, is the house capable of being transformed by the painting and cleaning we are able to undertake? Hi, it is of course the preference of this a group, which is the only consideration in the situation for contact with the dome isile in question has already been offered a small amount of blessing of I of this a group through its presence and as we have previously stated each of your days spend in a love, harmony, and thanksgiving. I will continue transforming a the dwelling. It is correct, as we have previously stated that physical cleanliness is most important. Therefore the efforts shall be made to most thoroughly cleanse the dwelling. In this regard, it is to be noted that neither in the a dwelling as a whole aware in you now reside or in the a chamber of this working is there an absence of your dust, earth, and other detritus, which is in toto cold dirt if the intention is to clean as much as is physically possible the location, the requirements for physical cleanliness are fulfilled, it is only a when a lower astral entity has, shall we say, placed portions of itself in the war, so cold a dirt of that care I should be a taken to or remove the sentient a being of these instructions we have a given. Is a physical spotlessness striven for about not achieved in each case the purity of intention and thoroughness of manifestation are appreciated. The variance between the attempt and the go is never noted and may be considered unimportant.
